63ab959c491bf8105af0cc2e.question: A bridge over this waterway featured a red pod for handicapped access that was slow and prone to overheating. Lorenzo Quinn sculpted two hands emerging out of this waterway to highlight the devastation of climate change. Several Fondaco buildings can be found along this waterway, which follows an ancient branch of the Brenta river. It’s crossed by the Bridge of the Barefoot Monks and the Santiago Calatrava designed Constitution Bridge. Traghetto and (*) vaporetto boats can be found on this waterway. It passes by the Santa Maria della Salute and Peggy Guggenheim Collection, and is crossed by the Rialto Bridge. This waterway runs from the Saint Lucia train station to the San Marco sestiere. For 10 points, name this large waterway that flows through the center of Venice.
